## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, calibration articles, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX created a comprehensive polishing instructions document based on Aembit's feedback, serving as a living style guide for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [First two calibration articles have been revised; team to review updates and potentially move to publishing stage](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Two additional calibration articles are ready for Aembit's review, aiming for less extensive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Content strategy balances search intent, Aembit's expertise, and conversion potential, with a focus on driving traffic initially](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Topics

### Polishing Instructions Document

  - [David created a detailed document incorporating feedback from Slack, calls, and Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Serves as a living style guide for content creation and AI prompts](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Aembit team to review and add specifics (e.g., AP style preference, industry-specific terms)](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Document will be continuously updated based on ongoing feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Calibration Articles Review Process

  - [First two articles revised based on detailed feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Aembit to review updates, focusing on implemented changes](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [If satisfactory, articles can move to "Ready for Publishing" stage](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Goal: Publish first two articles before next weekly call](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Two new calibration articles ready for Aembit's review](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Aiming for less extensive feedback on newer articles](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

### Content Strategy and Positioning

  - [Balance between addressing search intent and aligning with Aembit's product/expertise](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [Focus on differentiating between encryption key management and Aembit's access key solutions](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Aim to provide valuable information without forcing Aembit mentions in every article](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Start with content closely related to core competencies, gradually expanding topics](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Prioritize driving traffic initially, with conversion optimization as a secondary goal](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### Keyword Research and Topic Selection

  - [David provided 20-25 additional article topics for review](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Aembit team to review topics, move irrelevant ones to "Backlog"](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [New status options to be added: "Approved" and "Backlog"](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

### CMS and Publishing Process

  - [WordPress CMS in use](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [Dan to set up a call between David and Melissa (Aembit's brand person) for CMS walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [David likely to handle content publishing initially](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

### Product Launch Content

  - [Dan to send over upcoming product launch calendar (2-3 months out)](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [GrowthX to create top-of-funnel content aligned with product launches](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Aim to generate traffic for new product-related topics ahead of launches](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)

  - [Dan to schedule CMS walkthrough between David and Melissa](https://fathom.video/share/nbNo1BrSzTAHZyoQ8zs2by5Pg1ZJPYno?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
